About Us

Nigeria's One-Stop CNG Infrastructure Partner

GASCO ENERGY LTD is a 100% Nigerian-owned energy infrastructure firm focused on expanding access to safe, affordable, and sustainable Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) across Nigeria.

We provide integrated solutions across the entire CNG ecosystem — covering gas handling, compression, storage, distribution, and delivery to end-users including transportation fleets, industrial facilities, and residential consumers.

Feasibility StudiesBankable, evidence-based analysis
EPC ConstructionDesign to commissioning
Gas DistributionVirtual pipelines & stations
Power GenerationCNG generators 25kVA–5MW
20+
Projects
100%
Nigerian
6
Services

Our Vision

To emerge as Nigeria's foremost facilitator of gas-based energy solutions, making CNG a widely adopted, practical, and sustainable energy choice nationwide.

What We Do

Our Core Services

📋

Feasibility Studies & Regulatory Compliance

Comprehensive, bankable feasibility packages for all CNG infrastructure types — tiered as Lite, Standard, and Premium/Bankable — de-risking your investment from day one.

🏗️

CNG Infrastructure Development

Turnkey EPC design and construction of Mother/Daughter Stations, PRMS, MRUs, modular units, and virtual pipelines. NFPA, ASME, and ISO standards compliant.

🔄

Gas Processing & Distribution

Mid-downstream CNG distribution via virtual pipelines and MRUs. GSPA facilitation, feed gas treatment, and GPS-enabled fleet tracking with automated billing.

⚡

CNG Power Generation

Natural gas-fueled generators from 25 kVA to 2,500 kVA for industrial estates, hospitals, data centers, and campuses. CAPEX, lease-to-own, and EaaS models available.

🚗

Vehicle Conversion Centers

OEM-certified workshop facilities converting petrol/diesel vehicles to CNG — bi-fuel or dedicated. ECU re-mapping, QA bays, certification, and staff training.

🔩

Equipment & Spare Parts

Certified CNG infrastructure components — compressors, cascades, dispensers, PRMS, tube trailers — with OEM/SONCAP/ISO certification and full O&M contracts.

Why Choose Us

Six Reasons to Partner with GASCO

1

Comprehensive CNG Expertise

Full lifecycle coverage — feasibility, approvals, procurement, construction, and delivery under one roof.

2

Full-Spectrum Infrastructure

Mother & Daughter Stations, MRUs, virtual pipelines, and distribution networks for urban and regional needs.

3

Aligned with National Policy

Fully structured to support Nigeria's energy transition goals and the Presidential CNG Initiative (PCNGi).

4

Investment-Ready Structures

SPVs, BOOT schemes, and co-investment frameworks with bankable documentation and clear returns.

5

100% Nigerian & Compliant

NCDMB, NOGIC JQS, NIPEX, MDOGISP compliant. ISO certification in progress. Full local content focus.

6

Proven Track Record

20+ EPCIC projects for clients including Aggreko, Waltersmith, UAC Foods, Tetracore, and Axxela.

Regulatory Credentials

NIPEX NOGIC JQS NCDMB MDOGISP NMDPRA PCNGi Aligned NCEC Standards

Proven Delivery

Track Record & Works

With over two decades of hands-on engineering excellence, Gasco Energy — together with our trusted partners — has successfully delivered 20+ EPCIC projects across Nigeria's natural gas infrastructure. Working in close collaboration with Evrytn CNG, Gasup, NMDPRA, PICNG & EV, Bluesky Energy Technology, and Earthoc Energy Ltd, our engineers bring deep technical expertise, precision execution, and a commitment to safety on every project.

Key Clients
100%
Safety Record
Fradro Gas & Power

6 MMSCFD Natural Gas Compression Plant

EPC of internal piping with 6" SCH80 before compressor and 3" SCH160 after. Full Mother Station EPCIC scope. Delivered in collaboration with our partners.

EPCIC · Mother Station
Tetracore Energy

20 MMSCFD PRMS

Inlet 50 barG → Outlet 8.5 barG. 2-stage regulation, double stream, inter-stage heating with high-efficiency scrubber. Executed jointly with our partners.

EPCIC · PRMS
QSL Gas & Power

8,000 SCM/HR PRMS

Inlet 70 barG → Outlet 4.5 barG. 2-stage regulation, double stream, inter-stage heating and reinforced filtration. Completed in partnership with our network.

EPCIC · PRMS
Green Fuel Limited

3,000 SCM/HR CNG Station

Full mechanical, civil and electrical installation including low/high pressure piping, instrument cabling, and civil construction — delivered with our partners.

Full Installation · Daughter Station
Green Era

6" × 870M High Pressure Pipeline

Laying, installation, and commissioning of 870M pipeline with valve pit construction for a major gas distribution project. Delivered jointly with our partners.

EPCIC · Pipeline
Aggreko Project

2,300 SCM/HR Gas Train — 3 Units

Three gas train systems at 5 barG inlet, 500 mbarG outlet, single-stage regulation with double stream and high-efficiency filtration. Executed in collaboration with our trusted partners.

EPCIC · Gas Train × 3
Investment Pathway

CNG Feasibility Study Packages

Every GASCO project starts with a comprehensive feasibility study. Our three-tier packages de-risk your investment from site survey through to commissioning plan.

Feasibility Lite
Quick-Start · 4 Weeks
Site inspection & suitability check
Market review & pipeline access verification
High-level CAPEX/OPEX estimate
Preliminary off-takers mapping
Regulatory roadmap & licensing checklist
Basic ROI preview & conceptual site layout
📅 Delivery: 4 weeks
Standard
Full Analysis · 6–7 Weeks
Full bankable financial model (ROI, IRR, NPV)
Geotechnical scoping & detailed CAPEX breakdown
Technical design & compression sizing
FEED-level civil & structural sketches, P&IDs
Vendor/OEM shortlist for all equipment
EIA scoping, community engagement & SOPs
📅 Delivery: 6–7 weeks
Premium / Bankable
Investor-Ready · 7–8 Weeks
All Standard deliverables included
Full EIA & FEED drawings (civil, MEP, P&ID)
Tender-ready EPC documents
Financing pack — investment memo & term sheets
PPP structuring & investor readiness support
On-site commissioning & GO/NO-GO review
📅 Delivery: 7–8 weeks
